\tzpentry{ID11388}{Closed Angular-Diameter Distance}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
Positive-curvature distance replaces the flat chi distance by a sine of chi carrier.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
D_{A}(z)=\frac{a_{0}\sin\chi(z)}{1+z}
